title: The Executioner Revenge Electric Bug Zapper Fly Swatter Wasp, Mosquito, Bug, Insect Killer Single Layer Racket Efficient Zapping Indoor Outdoor Soft Touch Handle (The Executioner Revenge)
bullet_points: The Executioner Revenge is our smallest bug zapper in the range. With a soft touch handle and loop, this gives the fly zapper a luxury finish and feel to it. At a total length of 43cm this is the ideal fly swatter for travelling and camping.

Our strong & robust design made from ABS plastic is to ensure that we offer a product that is durable and will last. We pride ourselves on giving the best fly zapper we can, so your homes stay bug free.

Super tuned electronics that have been tested to over 100,000 zaps for more reliability and consistent zapping power. Our electric fly swatter is easy to us, simply insert the batteries and press and hold to button to use. The fly killer is a great addition to any home.
Ideal for Indoor & Outdoor uses, our electric fly zapper is great to be used when having Barbeques, or even on camping trips and holidays. It’s the perfect bug zapper companion and an ideal gift.
The Executioner range is widely regarded as the ultimate quality fly zapper. With a single zap it will eliminate pesky bugs, flies, wasps, mosquitos around your home.
Some of our Range of Executioners now come with a safety switch on the handle. This gives an added layer of protection.
